subcodes.first_line: It is abundantly clear and evident that this Wronged Exile hath, from the very inception of the Cause, cherished no desire for Himself
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بسی واضح و معلومست که این مظلوم غریب از اول امر از برای خود خیالی نداشته
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @the power of words; of speech, @goodly deeds; actions, @service to others; to the Cause of God
